{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Enkai's madra
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Enkai's madra]] can be bleeding fire that feels like blood.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
